meaning: adj.肯定的,实际的,积极的,绝对的,确实的adj.[数]正的adj.[电]阳的adj.[语法] 原级的
examples: I adopted a positive outlook on life.
The athlete tested positive for steroids.
Two athletes tested positive for steroids.
The science of statistics tells us that positive correlations range from 0.0 to 1.0.
With pay based on positive performance, the temptation to hide losses increases on trading desks.
